title: pelargonium senecioides
intro: Pelargonium senecioides, also known as the "Cape Geranium" or "Barberton daisy", is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family (Geraniaceae). Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium senecioides include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive discomfort, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
